# Andrey Pautov — CTI & Detection Engineering Research

> Structured cyber threat intelligence knowledge base by Andrey Pautov, Threat Intelligence Research Engineer at XPLG (Tel Aviv, Israel). Covers Israel and Middle East threat actor profiles, MITRE ATT&CK-mapped detection engineering, AI-assisted CTI methodology, malware analysis, and offensive security research. All content is evidence-traced and source-rated.

## Threat Actor Intelligence

- [Israel Government Threat Actors CTI](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/): 22 structured profiles of Iran-aligned and Palestinian-affiliated threat actors including OilRig (APT34), MuddyWater, APT35 (Magic Hound), APT42, Arid Viper, WIRTE, UNC1860, UNC3890, Agrius, Handala (Void Manticore), Scarred Manticore, Pioneer Kitten, Cotton Sandstorm, CyberAv3ngers, Lyceum, Imperial Kitten, Lebanese Cedar, TA402, Cyber Toufan, and DarkBit. Each profile maps TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK, includes detection hypotheses, KQL detection rules, and linked intelligence sources.
- [OilRig (APT34) profile](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/docs/actors/oilrig): Iran's most prolific espionage group. Custom backdoors, DNS tunneling C2, webshell persistence. Active since 2014.
- [MuddyWater (MOIS) profile](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/docs/actors/muddywater): MOIS subordinate element per CISA AA22-055A. RMM software abuse, PowerShell toolset, Israeli government targeting.
- [APT42 (IRGC-IO) profile](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/docs/actors/apt42): Surveillance cluster targeting journalists, civil society, and foreign governments. Cloud-focused credential theft.
- [WIRTE profile](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/docs/actors/wirte): Hamas-affiliated actor evolved from espionage to deploying SameCoin wiper against Israeli financial and hospital sectors.
- [Handala (Void Manticore) profile](https://1200km.com/israel-government-threat-actors-cti/docs/actors/handala): MOIS-linked destructive actor targeting Israeli organizations with wipers and influence operations since October 2023.

## CTI Methodology & Tradecraft

- [CTI Analyst Field Manual](https://1200km.com/cti-analyst-field-manual/): 80-page practitioner handbook covering source reliability (Admiralty scale), analytic discipline, alternative hypothesis generation, attribution methodology, infrastructure pivoting, and the complete CTI-to-detection workflow.
- [CTI as a Code](https://1200km.com/CTI_as_a_Code/): Version-controlled CTI methodology with 8 structured case studies. Evidence-traced analysis, deployable detections, and template-driven investigation workflows.
- [Customer-Driven AI CTI Project](https://1200km.com/customer-driven-ai-cti-project/): Gate-controlled CTI-to-detection methodology for customer engagements. Covers PIR/SIR definition, AI-assisted analysis with validation gates, structured deliverables, and detection handoff.
- [Operation Desert Hydra](https://1200km.com/operation-desert-hydra/): Complete 6-phase CTI-to-detection pipeline for MuddyWater/Seedworm. Source gathering → OpenCTI STIX 2.1 → detection atlas → Kibana-validated rules. Validation results: 14 PASS / 1 PARTIAL / 1 FAIL.

## Detection Engineering & Security Reference

- [Anomaly Detection Atlas](https://1200km.com/anomaly-detection-atlas/): 118 statistical anomaly classification types, 175 security log sources mapped to ATT&CK tactics, algorithmic detection rule catalog.
- [CVSS v4.0 Field Guide](https://1200km.com/cvss/): 13-chapter practical guide to CVSS v4.0 scoring — base, threat, and environmental scoring, severity tiers, response SLAs, and vulnerability prioritization workflow.
- [ThreatMapper Web](https://1200km.com/threat-matrix/): Browser-native MITRE ATT&CK explorer across Enterprise, Mobile, ICS, and ATLAS (AI/ML) frameworks. Group comparison, TTP overlap scoring, coverage gap analysis, report export.
- [ThreatMapper Docs](https://1200km.com/threatmapper-docs/): Documentation for the self-hosted AI-assisted CTI-to-detection platform. ATT&CK technique extraction, Jaccard TTP overlap scoring, Navigator heatmaps.
- [Projects & Public Footprint](https://1200km.com/projects.html): Canonical inventory of public projects, PyPI packages, Medium article clusters, GitHub repositories, and external community submission status.
- [BrittleBench](https://1200km.com/brittle/): Detection rule robustness research — auditing YARA, Elastic, and Sigma rules against functionally equivalent behavioral mutations.
- [Insider Threat Detection](https://1200km.com/insider-threat-detection/): Detection engineering guide with 14 documented historical insider threat cases (Manning, Snowden), UEBA methodology, behavioral analytics, and a four-phase implementation program.

## AI & Offensive Security

- [AI vs Defense](https://1200km.com/ai-vs-defense/): Analysis of how AI-assisted offensive techniques collapse the skill floor and what defenders must adapt — SOC modernization, behavioral detection, Pyramid of Pain.
- [HexStrike AI Guide](https://1200km.com/Hexstrike-AI-guide/): AI-orchestrated penetration testing framework using MCP with Gemini, OpenAI, Cursor, and Llama. Network discovery, exploitation, web application testing.
- [OpenCTI Intelligent Shield](https://1200km.com/opencti-intelligent-shield/): Deploying AI-powered enrichment in OpenCTI with Claude connector, STIX 2.1 automation, and confidence scoring.

## Published Research

- [Medium articles (100+)](https://medium.com/@1200km): CTI investigations, detection engineering techniques, malware analysis, AI-assisted security workflows, offensive security research.
- [Medium Blog Navigator](https://1200km.com/medium-blog-navigation/): Indexed and categorized archive of all published articles across 18 topic categories.

## Author

**Andrey Pautov** — Threat Intelligence Research Engineer at XPLG. Formerly Head of Red Team at Israel Police Cyber Defence Unit (Jul 2023–May 2025). CTI analyst, detection engineer, malware analyst, and offensive security researcher based in Tel Aviv, Israel.

Expertise: cyber threat intelligence, MITRE ATT&CK, detection engineering, threat hunting, malware analysis, adversary profiling, AI-assisted CTI workflows, penetration testing, cloud security.

- Website: https://1200km.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/anpa1200
- Medium: https://medium.com/@1200km
